errors.name: PricesMismatch
errors.msg: Prices and price names arrays must be the same length

errors.name: InvalidOddsUpdate
errors.msg: Invalid odds update for this event

errors.name: InvalidSubTreeProof
errors.msg: Invalid sub-tree proof. The snapshot does not belong to the summary.

errors.name: InvalidMainTreeProof
errors.msg: Invalid main tree proof. The summary does not belong to the on-chain root.

errors.name: TimeSlotMismatch
errors.msg: Time slot mismatch between snapshot and on-chain root account.

errors.name: InvalidTime
errors.msg: The provided hour or minute is out of the valid range.

errors.name: RootNotAvailable
errors.msg: Merkle root for this time slot has not been posted by the oracle.

errors.name: InvalidPda
errors.msg: The provided daily root account does not match the expected PDA.

errors.name: TimestampMismatch
errors.msg: The timestamp provided for seed generation does not match the timestamp in the snapshot payload.

errors.name: SliceError
errors.msg: Could not slice the account data correctly.

errors.name: InvalidTimeSlot
errors.msg: Invalid time slot, must be aligned on a 5-min boundary.

errors.name: StakeStillLocked
errors.msg: Stake is still locked and cannot be withdrawn yet.

errors.name: InvalidRecipient
errors.msg: Invalid recipient of the financial transaction.

errors.name: ActiveSubscription
errors.msg: You already have an active subscription.

errors.name: InvalidWeeks
errors.msg: Weeks must be greater than zero

types.name: ScoreStat
docs: The on-chain representation of a single, provable key-value statistic.
This is the leaf of the inner-most Merkle tree.

types.name: ScoresBatchSummary
docs: The summary for a single fixture's scores events within a 5-minute batch.
This contains the root of the sub-tree of all events for that fixture.
